calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-09-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling.

The claim of exemption is denied. $3,230.17 shall be released to the plaintiff creditor. Any other funds shall be released to the defendant debtor.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)
